copy.title: Catch-and-Shoot — Read the Feet
copy.prompt: Short closeout, no hip arrow. Read his feet.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court shell. Ball reverses from the slot to the right wing. Your defender was helping in the paint — the on-screen hip arrow is gone, so read his feet and his cushion.
copy.possession_setup: You are the right wing. Your defender (x2) was helping one pass away. As the pass arrives he sprints out, still short of his cushion. No hip arrow this time.
copy.decision_moment: The ball hits your hands. x2 is closing hard but decelerating, feet still pointed at the ball. The cushion in front of your release is open.
copy.visible_cue: x2's feet are under him but pointed at the ball, not at you. Hands not yet up. The cushion is yours.
copy.best_read: Catch in the shooting pocket and rise. The closeout is short and under control — the shot is open before his hands get up.
copy.explanation_md: **Advantage or Reset — fewer hints.** The hip arrow is gone, but the read is the same. Look at his feet and the cushion in front of you. If his feet are still pointed at the ball and his hands aren't up, he is short — catch and shoot. If he flies past you, drive. If he is set, reset. Real defenders don't paint arrows on themselves; read the body.

feedback.correct: Good read. No arrow — you read his feet and the cushion, and shot before his hands were up.
feedback.partial: A drive can work against a flying closeout. This one was short and under control — the shot was the cleaner read.
feedback.wrong: Read his feet and his cushion. If the closeout is short, the shot is open. Catch and shoot.

self_review_checklist: Did I read his feet instead of waiting for an arrow?
Did I catch in my shooting pocket?
Did I check the cushion before I dribbled?
Did I shoot before his hands were up?
acceptable_reads: Rip and drive baseline if the defender is sprinting past — produces a layup or kickout, but loses the clean catch-and-shoot.
bad_reads: Pass back to the point — gives up the open look and resets the defense.
Hold and pump fake — the defender closes the cushion and contests.

shoot.label: Shoot it.
shoot.feedback_text: Best read. You picked up the short closeout from his feet — clean look off the catch.

rip_and_drive.label: Rip and drive past him.
rip_and_drive.feedback_text: Okay. Driving works against a flying closeout, but this one was under control. The shot was the cleaner read.
rip_and_drive.partial_feedback_text: A drive can work, but you gave up the open jumper. Short closeout — shoot it.

pass_back.label: Pass it back to the point.
pass_back.feedback_text: Not yet. You had an open shot. Passing it back lets the defense set up.

pump_fake_hold.label: Hold the ball and pump fake.
pump_fake_hold.feedback_text: Not yet. The defender catches up while you hesitate. The shot was open at the catch.
